args.query:
SELECT id, sample_repo_name, sample_path, repo_data_description
FROM contents
WHERE lower(sample_path) LIKE '%.swift'
  AND (repo_data_description IS NULL OR lower(repo_data_description) NOT LIKE '%binary%')
  AND lower(repo_data_description) LIKE '%copies%';

exec_args.sql:
SELECT id, sample_repo_name, sample_path, repo_data_description
FROM contents
WHERE lower(sample_path) LIKE '%.swift'
  AND (repo_data_description IS NULL OR lower(repo_data_description) NOT LIKE '%binary%')
  AND lower(repo_data_description) LIKE '%copies%';

args.query:
SELECT id, sample_repo_name, sample_path, repo_data_description
FROM contents
WHERE lower(sample_path) LIKE '%.swift'
  AND (repo_data_description IS NULL OR lower(repo_data_description) NOT LIKE '%binary%')
LIMIT 50;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT id, sample_repo_name, sample_path, repo_data_description
FROM contents
WHERE lower(sample_path) LIKE '%.swift'
  AND (repo_data_description IS NULL OR lower(repo_data_description) NOT LIKE '%binary%')
LIMIT 50;

args.query: SELECT id, sample_repo_name, sample_path, repo_data_description FROM contents WHERE lower(sample_path) LIKE '%.swift' LIMIT 20;

exec_args.sql: SELECT id, sample_repo_name, sample_path, repo_data_description FROM contents WHERE lower(sample_path) LIKE '%.swift' LIMIT 20;

args.query:
SELECT id, sample_repo_name, sample_path, repo_data_description
FROM contents
WHERE lower(sample_path) LIKE '%.swift'
  AND (repo_data_description IS NULL OR lower(repo_data_description) NOT LIKE '%binary%')
ORDER BY CAST(regexp_extract(repo_data_description, '(?:duplicated|copied|appearing|appears|seen)\\s+(\\d+)\\s+times', 1) AS BIGINT) DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT id, sample_repo_name, sample_path, repo_data_description
FROM contents
WHERE lower(sample_path) LIKE '%.swift'
  AND (repo_data_description IS NULL OR lower(repo_data_description) NOT LIKE '%binary%')
ORDER BY CAST(regexp_extract(repo_data_description, '(?:duplicated|copied|appearing|appears|seen)\\s+(\\d+)\\s+times', 1) AS BIGINT) DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT id, sample_repo_name, sample_path, repo_data_description,
       CAST(regexp_extract(repo_data_description, '(\\d+) times', 1) AS BIGINT) AS copies
FROM contents
WHERE lower(sample_path) LIKE '%.swift'
  AND (repo_data_description IS NULL OR lower(repo_data_description) NOT LIKE '%binary%')
ORDER BY copies DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 5;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT id, sample_repo_name, sample_path, repo_data_description,
       CAST(regexp_extract(repo_data_description, '(\\d+) times', 1) AS BIGINT) AS copies
FROM contents
WHERE lower(sample_path) LIKE '%.swift'
  AND (repo_data_description IS NULL OR lower(repo_data_description) NOT LIKE '%binary%')
ORDER BY copies DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 5;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT id, sample_repo_name, sample_path, repo_data_description
FROM contents
WHERE lower(sample_path) LIKE '%.swift'
  AND lower(repo_data_description) LIKE '%non-binary%';
